response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a virtual live concert. 2. Detected three distinct songs: '未来カノネラ' (00:00-01:04), '雨とペトラ' (01:05-04:44), and '群青讃歌' (04:45-05:01). 3. Used on-screen text to identify songs and composers. 4. Searched for lyrics using original composer names (Balloon and Eve) in Japanese without quotes. 5. Lyrics for '未来カノネラ' were not found, set to null. 6. Lyrics for '雨とペトラ' and '群青讃歌' were found and formatted.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual concert performance by two VTubers. It includes a performance of an original song titled '未来カノネラ' (Miraikanonera), followed by cover performances of '雨とペトラ' (Ame to Petra) originally by Balloon, and '群青讃歌' (Gunjo Sanka) originally by Eve.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song '未来カノネラ'. The title appears on the top-left corner.
The VTubers perform a cover of '雨とペトラ' by Balloon. The song title and composer are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
誰かが言った いつか空は灰になって落ちるって
妄想の世の中で 日々を喰らっている
境界線を引いてしまったのも
共感覚のせいにして
街の灯の海で 居場所を探している
どこへ行くにも この足は
退屈に染まって 動かない
少しだけ先 消えそうな景色が
見たいだけなのに 見たいだけなのに
雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
頬を濡らしてしまう
枯れてしまったの
愛しくなるのに
目を瞑ったら 目を瞑ったらもっと
遠く霞んでしまう
ふるさとなった雨の音
笑い飛ばしてくれ
[...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Someone said, someday the sky will turn to ash and fall
I'm eating away at my days in a world of delusion
Crossing the boundary line
And taking the sensation with me
In this sea of city lights, I'm searching for my place
Where am I going? These feet are also
Stained by boredom, unable to move
Just a little bit ahead, the scenery I want to see
Even though I just want to see it, even though I just want to see it
If it rains, if it rains, I'm sure I'll drench my cheeks
It's already withered, so even though I become lovely
If I close my eyes, if I close my eyes, it will surely blur further away
Laugh and blow away the sound of the rain that has withered
[...]

scenes.description: The VTubers perform a cover of '群青讃歌' by Eve. The song title and composer are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
繋がっていたいって 信じられる言葉
だってもう昨日の僕らにおさらば
青い春を過ごした 遠い稲妻
さっと泣いて 前だけを向けたら
きっとどんなに楽になれていたろうな
この心を揺らした 一縷の望みは
ないものねだりは辞めた 未完成人間
素晴らしき世界だけが 答えを握ってる
諦めてしまうほど この先沢山の
後悔が君を待ってるけど
もうない 迷いはしないよ
[...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Words I can believe, saying I want to stay connected
Because we already said goodbye to the us of yesterday
We spent our blue spring, distant lightning
If I could just cry and look only forward
I'm sure I could have been so much more at ease
[...]
